timeline_events.description: The first dialup email service in Pakistan.

timeline_events.title: Paknet
timeline_events.description: Paknet initiated dial-up text-based internet services, expanding early digital connectivity.

timeline_events.title: Transworld
timeline_events.description: Associated launched first submarine cable linking Karachi and UAE. There was launch of first FTTH by Nayatel Pvt.Ltd

timeline_events.title: 3G & 4G
timeline_events.description: Cybernet launched StormFiber, FTTH Triple Play, Optix, TW Home & other FTTH players

timeline_events.title: 4.5G LTE
timeline_events.description: Wi-tribe signed contract to launch 4.5G LTE.

timeline_events.title: 5G
timeline_events.description: Pakistan became the first South Asian country to test 5G services
